subcodes.first_line: O thou who art bereft of all earthly possessions! In truth, in the path of God thou hast quaffed every cup of tribulation and endured every hardship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بیسر و سامان من فی الحقیقه در سبیل الهی هر جام بلائی نوشیدی و هر ضر و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @poems and quotation from poetry
